title: EasySort
description: A client-side mod that adds a keybinding to sort container inventories in the order of creative mode inventory tabs.
body:
# EasySort  
A client-side mod that adds a keybinding to sort container inventories in the order of creative mode inventory tabs.  
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce9ebb79b8b98d28e7f02c06a0686267534962dc_0.webp)
### Key bind:  
![KeyBinding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b7aabdcc0c903d0f58e9ad3b7aaf71018a10949_0.webp)  
### Supported container or screen:  
Survival mode player inventory.  
Creative mode player inventory.  
Chest and big chest.  
Copper chest and big copper chest.  
Shulker box.
